page_title: Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo Original Soundtrack
text:
is the second soundtrack album of Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo. The album was published by King Records via its label STARCHILD with the catalog number SSX-10277, it was released on 24 April 2013. http://vgmdb.net/album/37927 

It features music composed by Shirō Sagisu exactly as it appears in the film, as well as the film's closing credits song performed by Hikaru Utada. It was sold as a first pressing release with the Blu-Ray/DVD release of the film with the catalog number KIXA-290/KIBA-2015 on 24 April 2013.
